ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently with */,
  "primary_position" TEXT /* Primary position the player plays */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, traded) */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting side (right, left, switch) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing side (right, left) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "assistant_coach_email" TEXT /* Email of the assistant coach */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_opened" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors (e.g., Red, White) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "field_position" TEXT /* Indicates if the position is a field position (e.g., infield, outfield) */,
  "batting_order" TEXT /* Typical batting order for the position (e.g., leadoff, cleanup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the player's primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "total_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the contract */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Signing bonus or other bonuses */,
  "performance_bonus" INTEGER /* Performance-based bonuses */,
  "option_years" TEXT /* Option years in the contract (e.g., 2025, 2026) */,
  "no_trade_clause" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has a no-trade clause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is moving from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is moving to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agent signing) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "traded_for_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player traded for (if applicable) */,
  "traded_for_assets" TEXT /* Other assets traded (e.g., draft picks) */,
  "traded_for_cash" INTEGER /* Cash amount traded (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_traded_for_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_for_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the status started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the status ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Estimated return date for injured players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_status_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_caps" (
  "cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary cap entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the cap applies to */,
  "total_cap" INTEGER /* Total salary cap for the team */,
  "current_spending" INTEGER /* Current spending of the team */,
  "luxury_tax_threshold" INTEGER /* Luxury tax threshold for the season */,
  "over_cap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team is over the salary cap */,
  "over_cap_amount" INTEGER /* Amount by which the team is over the salary cap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_caps_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity being accessed (e.g., player, team) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistics are for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in (RBIs) */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage (OBP) */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage (SLG) */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
